Prayer Calendar

Join us in daily prayer for the people and parishes in our diocese

Ahead of each daily prayer, we reach out to every parish to ask if there are specific things they would like us to prayer for. Please follow us on Facebook, Instagram or BlueSky to read and pray into these requests.
